meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build a professional developer portfolio fast. Master the workflow to ship high-quality projects today.
content.answer_block: You don't need years of experience to build a portfolio; you need velocity. By combining Antigravity's rapid prototyping with Claude Code’s autonomous engineering, you can generate production-ready SaaS modules in hours. This workflow transforms your lack of history into a demonstration of modern, AI-augmented engineering efficiency.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the ambition, but the lack of 'shipped' projects creates a silent barrier between you and high-paying clients. Every hour spent agonizing over boilerplate code is an hour lost on revenue-generating work. It is time to stop building from scratch and start orchestrating.

We are shifting the paradigm from manual coding to AI-assisted architecture. By leveraging the Claude Code CLI and the rapid iteration power of Antigravity, you can build complex, professional-grade tools that demonstrate architectural mastery rather than just 'hello world' scripts. This isn't just about writing code; it's about building a narrative of technical competence.

steps.title: Define Your Architectural Scope
steps.description: Identify a high-impact SaaS feature to build. We focus on utility, not vanity, to impress technical clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior SaaS Architect. Design a modular, scalable architecture for a real-time dashboard that tracks API usage metrics. Include a database schema and endpoint definitions.

steps.title: Initialize the Repository Structure
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold a clean, production-ready environment that adheres to industry standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory structure and configuration files for a Node.js project using TypeScript, including strict linting and testing setup.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize project scaffolding with TypeScript, ESLint, and Vitest configuration'

steps.title: Implement Core Business Logic
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to write robust logic while you act as the architectural reviewer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core service logic for calculating rolling 30-day API usage, ensuring O(n) complexity and handling edge cases for empty datasets.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement usage service logic with validation and error handling'

steps.title: Automate Documentation Generation
steps.description: A portfolio project is worthless without professional documentation. Automate the creation of your README.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a professional README.md that explains the architectural decisions, tech stack, and setup instructions for this project.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate comprehensive technical documentation in README.md'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Finalize your build and push to a public repository to serve as your live proof of work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a checklist for final deployment readiness and security audit before pushing to GitHub.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Verify build integrity and prepare deployment script'

pro_tips: Always wrap your Claude Code prompts in specific persona contexts like 'Senior Staff Engineer' to force higher-quality design patterns.
Use Antigravity to generate unit tests before the actual code; this forces the AI to understand the requirements as an interface first.
Keep your Claude Code sessions focused on a single 'atomic' module to prevent context drift and hallucination in large files.
Tag your GitHub commits with 'AI-Assisted Architecture' to signal to clients that you are an early adopter of efficiency tools.
Maintain a 'prompt library' of your most successful Antigravity commands to ensure consistent code style across your entire portfolio.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, iterate by adding a secondary feature using the same workflow. Document the process to create a 'Case Study' blog post to accompany your code.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect client to find you—build the portfolio that makes them seek you out. The future of freelancing belongs to those who ship at the speed of thought. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
